hero.title: Authenticity You Can Taste
hero.subtitle: Traditional Urfa flavors served since 1973.
hero.subtitle_text: Experience the authentic taste of Urfa Kebap. Hand-kneaded köfte and perfectly charred meats, served with the same passion for over 50 years.

menuHero.title: Our Exclusive Picks
menuHero.subtitle: Each item has been handpicked, blending innovation and tradition to deliver an unforgettable dining experience.

about.title: A Tradition of Taste Since 1973
about.description: For over half a century, Urfa Kebap 26 has been a cornerstone of Eskişehir’s culinary landscape. What started as a family passion in 1973 has evolved into a legacy of flavor, where every kofte and kebab is prepared with time-honored techniques passed down through generations. We don't just serve food; we serve a piece of our heritage, grilled to perfection over natural charcoal.

menuSection.title: A Taste of Heritage in Every Bite
menuSection.subtitle: Discover the authentic flavors of Urfa, prepared with 50 years of mastery and served with Turkish hospitality.

quality.title: Masterfully Grilled
quality.description: Premium meats hand-kneaded and slow-cooked over natural charcoal for that signature smoky finish.

authenticity.title: Traditional Recipes
authenticity.description: Authentic Urfa flavors passed down since 1973, staying true to our roots and regional spices.

creativity.title: The Art of Flavor
creativity.description: From 'Zırh' kebabs to handmade pides, we blend tradition with culinary excellence.

homeMenu.title: Discover Our Categories
homeMenu.subtitle: Explore our carefully curated selections — from kebap and pide to desserts and künefe. Tap a category to jump straight to its full menu.

kebapPide.title: Kebap & Pide
kebapPide.subtitle: KEBAP · PİDE
kebapPide.description: From smoky kebaps to freshly baked pide, this section brings the heart of our grill straight to your table.

yemekKonfor.title: Yemek & Konfor
yemekKonfor.subtitle: YEMEK · KONFOR
yemekKonfor.description: Home-style stews and hearty konfor plates that feel like a warm embrace with every bite.

corbaDoner.title: Çorba & Döner
corbaDoner.subtitle: ÇORBA · DÖNER
corbaDoner.description: Start with a comforting bowl of soup and continue with our juicy döner specialties.

icecekSalata.title: İçecek & Salata
icecekSalata.subtitle: İÇECEK · SALATA
icecekSalata.description: Refreshing drinks and crisp salads that perfectly balance and complete your meal.

tatliKunefe.title: Tatlı & Künefe
tatliKunefe.subtitle: TATLI · KÜNEFE
tatliKunefe.description: Finish on a high note with our rich desserts and perfectly baked künefe.

footer.description: It's an art form, a language that communicates across borders, an expression of love and creativity plated to perfection.
